description: Classifies M11-era files for final submission packaging. Prefer lucid.md and M11 closeout docs when prose disagrees with older derivatives.

operator_local_non_canonical.notes: Optional local Cursor/CI helper; not part of authoritative repo evidence.

m11_artifacts.notes: P12/P24/P48 task rows merged with M09 export by ingest; backs P12 completion claims in M11_audit.md.
Per-model P12 cost totals; referenced by M11 closeout and analytical tables.
Governance/supporting evidence for M11_run2 tooling recovery; not benchmark semantics.
Regenerated by ingest from committed exports; canonical for M11 tables/figures.
Lists export paths and SHA-256 for ingest inputs.
Pre-upload notebook file hashes and pin SHAs for Kaggle execution.

superseded_or_placeholder_notes: Any ad-hoc M11 CSV or note outside artifacts/ that duplicates an authoritative path should be treated as superseded once the artifacts/ copy is committed.
M01 §6 hosted-model score table in docs/lucid.md remains historical M01 evidence, not superseded by M09/M11; do not overwrite.
